resolutions.advice: SIM swap processed successfully. Advise customer to use their new SIM.
resolutions.next_step: Inform about migration of services and M-PESA app reinstall.
resolutions.template_text: Customer vetting passed. SIM swap processed. Advised on app migration and to reinstall M-PESA app on new SIM.

resolutions.advice: Visit retail center with valid ID or call back with correct details.
resolutions.next_step: Escalate to retail or request callback with verified details.
resolutions.template_text: Vetting failed. Advised to visit nearest Safaricom Retail Center with valid ID or call back with correct details.

resolutions.advice: Visit retail center to update KYC details before proceeding.
resolutions.next_step: Direct to RC for KYC update and SIM swap.
resolutions.template_text: KYC mismatch detected. Advised to visit Retail Center with correct ID to update KYC details before SIM swap.

resolutions.advice: Customer has exceeded max swap requests. Visit retail center.
resolutions.next_step: Escalate to manager or direct to RC.
resolutions.template_text: Maximum SIM swap requests reached. Advised to visit nearest Retail Center for manual processing.

resolutions.advice: Call from alternate line or visit retail center for replacement.
resolutions.next_step: Arrange callback or direct to RC.
resolutions.template_text: Line not active. Advised to call from agent line or visit nearest Retail Center for SIM replacement.

resolutions.advice: Reversal initiated. 2-hour SLA. Educate on Hakikisha feature.
resolutions.next_step: Advise patience and to check status in 2 hours.
resolutions.template_text: Reversal initiated with 2-hour SLA. Educated on Hakikisha feature. Advised to be patient during processing.

resolutions.advice: Reversal initiated. 12-hour SLA. Educate on Hakikisha.
resolutions.next_step: Advise patience and provide reference number.
resolutions.template_text: Reversal initiated with 12-hour SLA. Educated on Hakikisha feature. Advised to wait for confirmation.

resolutions.advice: Reversal initiated. 72-hour SLA. Educate on Hakikisha.
resolutions.next_step: Provide reference; advise callback after SLA.
resolutions.template_text: Reversal initiated with 72-hour SLA. Educated on Hakikisha feature. Advised to check status after 72 hours.

resolutions.advice: Service Request raised for manual reversal. 72-hour SLA.
resolutions.next_step: Provide SR reference; advise callback after SLA.
resolutions.template_text: Service Request raised for reversal processing. SLA: 72 hours. Advised to call back for status update.

resolutions.advice: Reversal pending authorization within SLA. Advised patience.
resolutions.next_step: Provide timeline; advise to call back.
resolutions.template_text: Reversal pending authorization within SLA. Advised to be patient as authorization is being processed.

resolutions.advice: For PayBill reversals, contact business directly or use SMS reversal.
resolutions.next_step: Provide SMS number 456 or business contact.
resolutions.template_text: For PayBill reversal, contact the business or send M-PESA message to SMS 456 within 24 hours.

resolutions.advice: Provided DIY procedure for PIN reset/setup.
resolutions.next_step: Customer to follow USSD steps; callback if issues.
resolutions.template_text: M-PESA PIN procedure provided. Customer educated on DIY steps. SMS sent with instructions.

resolutions.advice: Customer educated on forgot PIN procedure via USSD.
resolutions.next_step: Customer to use *334# to reset; callback if needed.
resolutions.template_text: PIN reset procedure provided. Customer advised to use Safaricom app or dial *334# to reset PIN.

resolutions.advice: Security questions setup provided for PIN recovery.
resolutions.next_step: Customer to set questions; advise recording answers.
resolutions.template_text: M-PESA security questions setup procedure provided. Customer advised to set 3 questions for PIN recovery.

resolutions.advice: DIY unsuccessful. Advise visit RC or callback.
resolutions.next_step: Escalate to RC for manual PIN reset.
resolutions.template_text: DIY procedure unsuccessful. Advised to visit nearest Retail Center or call back for manual assistance.

resolutions.advice: Customer requires in-person verification for PIN reset.
resolutions.next_step: Direct to RC with valid ID.
resolutions.template_text: Advised to visit nearest Safaricom Retail Center with valid ID for M-PESA PIN reset.

resolutions.advice: PUK code provided. Customer educated on unblocking procedure.
resolutions.next_step: Customer to follow unblocking steps.
resolutions.template_text: PUK code provided. Customer educated on DIY procedure to unblock SIM using provided code.

resolutions.advice: USSD DIY procedure provided to retrieve PUK.
resolutions.next_step: Customer uses *100# or *456# to get PUK.
resolutions.template_text: PUK DIY procedure (USSD) provided. Customer advised to dial *100# or *456# from another line to receive PUK.

resolutions.advice: App link provided to retrieve PUK without needing another line.
resolutions.next_step: Customer clicks link to retrieve PUK code.
resolutions.template_text: PUK retrieval link provided: https://safaricomapp.page.link/get-puk. Customer can retrieve PUK directly.

resolutions.advice: Customer unable to retrieve PUK online. Direct to RC.
resolutions.next_step: Visit RC with ID for manual assistance.
resolutions.template_text: Advised to visit nearest Safaricom Retail Center with valid ID to retrieve PUK and unblock SIM.

resolutions.advice: Service Request raised for pooled line recreation.
resolutions.next_step: Provide SR reference; advise callback after 72hrs.
resolutions.template_text: Service Request raised for pooled line recreation. SLA: 72 hours. Customer advised to call back for status.

resolutions.advice: Advise patience as SR is being processed.
resolutions.next_step: Provide reference; customer callback as needed.
resolutions.template_text: Pooled line recreation is being processed. Advised to be patient and call back if needed.

resolutions.advice: Escalate to RC for corporate/pooled support.
resolutions.next_step: Contact RC during business hours.
resolutions.template_text: Advised to visit or contact nearest Retail Center for corporate pooled line support.

resolutions.advice: Billing correction applied to loan account.
resolutions.next_step: Apologize and advise to resume normal use.
resolutions.template_text: Billing issue corrected. An adjustment has been made to your account. Sorry for the inconvenience.

resolutions.advice: Advise on limit increase through continued usage and savings.
resolutions.next_step: Educate on using services to boost limit.
resolutions.template_text: Advised to save and transact regularly to increase loan limit over time.

resolutions.advice: Outstanding debt detected. Customer must clear before accessing loan.
resolutions.next_step: Advise on payment options.
resolutions.template_text: Outstanding debt detected. Advised to clear past due amount to resume loan accessibility.

resolutions.advice: Provide general guidance on loan terms and conditions.
resolutions.next_step: Educate and advise accordingly.
resolutions.template_text: Advised on loan terms and conditions. Continue using services responsibly to maintain/increase limit.

resolutions.advice: Line unsuspended after successful vetting.
resolutions.next_step: Advise customer to use services normally.
resolutions.template_text: Line unsuspended. Customer vetting passed. Advised to resume normal use of services.

resolutions.advice: Vetting failed. Customer directed to retail center.
resolutions.next_step: Visit RC with valid ID for unsuspension.
resolutions.template_text: Vetting failed. Advised to visit nearest Safaricom Retail Center with valid ID for line unsuspension.

resolutions.advice: Action completed. Customer vetting passed.
resolutions.template_text:
Sub fulizad advised on LU
[VETTING]

resolutions.advice: Vetting failed secondary. Advised to confirm & call back.
resolutions.template_text:
Sub fulizad advised on LU
[VETTING]

resolutions.advice: Vetting failed. Advised to visit Retail Center with valid ID.
resolutions.template_text:
Sub fulizad advised on LU
[VETTING]

resolutions.advice: Failed twice. Directed to Retail Center.
resolutions.template_text:
Sub fulizad advised on LU
[VETTING]

resolutions.advice: Shiriki pay beneficiary removed sub vetted on:
resolutions.template_text: Shiriki pay beneficiary removed sub vetted on:

resolutions.advice: Vetting failed. Sub advised to visit nearest Retail Center with valid ID.
resolutions.template_text: Vetting failed. Sub advised to visit nearest Retail Center with valid ID.

resolutions.advice: Vetting failed secondary. Sub advised to confirm details and call back.
resolutions.template_text: Vetting failed secondary. Sub advised to confirm details and call back.

resolutions.advice: Vetting failed. Sub advised to visit nearest Retail Center with valid ID.
resolutions.template_text: Vetting failed. Sub advised to visit nearest Retail Center with valid ID.

resolutions.advice: Sub failed vetting twice. Directed to Retail Center for manual verification.
resolutions.template_text: Sub failed vetting twice. Directed to Retail Center for manual verification.
